people.name: Bitan Paul
people.bio: Bitan Paul founded phiUture and leads its engineering. With 2+ years building production-grade Generative AI, LLM, and agentic systems, he works across the full AI lifecycle — RAG pipelines, multi-agent orchestration, computer vision, and cloud-native data engineering — and maintains a large body of open-source work. Through phiUture he brings that same standard to every product and creative release: capable underneath, effortless on the surface.

journey.title: Started with AI
journey.description: Began a B.E. in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning at Chandigarh University.

journey.title: Went deep on machine learning
journey.description: Earned the ISRO / IIRS "Machine Learning to Deep Learning" certification and started building with deep learning, computer vision, and NLP.

journey.title: Shipped to real users
journey.description: Launched Campus Buddy, a published Android app — 1,000+ downloads, 600+ active users, and a 4.8★ rating.

journey.title: Graduated
journey.description: Completed the B.E. in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning at Chandigarh University.

journey.title: Started a professional career
journey.description: Joined an AI company as a Data Engineering & AI Specialist, building production Generative AI, LLM, and cloud data systems.

journey.title: Founded phiUture
journey.description: Launched phiUture as the umbrella for products, AI agents, automation solutions, and creative work.

journey.title: Scaling the vision
journey.description: 2+ years into building production LLM and agentic systems — growing the phiUture ecosystem across AI, data, applications, and music.

capabilities.title: AI Agents & RAG
capabilities.description: Agentic pipelines, retrieval-augmented systems, and computer-vision models — built token-first so intelligence stays affordable at scale.

capabilities.title: Full-Stack Applications
capabilities.description: Production web and mobile experiences engineered end to end — from architecture and API to a polished, responsive interface.

capabilities.title: Automation Engineering
capabilities.description: Self-running workflows that create, publish, and clean up without a hand on the wheel — measured in hours of effort removed.

capabilities.title: Data & Analytics
capabilities.description: Medallion data pipelines with quality gates and streaming, plus BI dashboards that turn raw data into decisions.

capabilities.title: Applied Research
capabilities.description: Proof-of-concept R&D that stress-tests unconventional ideas — pushing a platform far past what it was designed to do.

capabilities.title: Beyond — Music & Video
capabilities.description: Original records and music videos released to real audiences on Spotify and YouTube, with AI brought into the studio as a collaborator, not a shortcut.
